title: Nephrodium dentatum
taxonomy: Nephrodium dentatum is classified within the family Dryopteridaceae, which includes various species of ferns. The genus Nephrodium is now considered a synonym of Dryopteris, a genus of wood ferns. Therefore, Nephrodium dentatum is also classified within the genus Dryopteris. This classification is based on the plant's morphological characteristics and evolutionary relationships. As a result, Nephrodium dentatum is often treated as Dryopteris dentata in modern botanical classifications.
